mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review SET order_id=#{orderId}, rating=#{rating}, contents=#{text}, photo=#{image}
mapper.select: SELECT user_no FROM orders WHERE order_id=#{orderId}

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, s.store_name AS storeName, (SELECT menu_name FROM order_detail WHERE order_id = r.order_id LIMIT 1) AS menuName, r.rating, r.contents, r.photo, DATE_FORMAT(r.write_at, CONCAT(YEAR(r.write_at), '.', LPAD(MONTH(r.write_at), 2, '0'), '.', LPAD(DAY(r.write_at), 2, '0')) ) AS date FROM review r JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = r.order_id JOIN store s ON s.store_id = o.store_id WHERE o.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY r.write_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{startIdx}

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.order_id AS orderId, r.rating, r.contents, r.photo, s.store_name AS storeName, (SELECT menu_name FROM order_detail WHERE order_id = r.order_id LIMIT 1) AS menuName FROM review r JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = r.order_id JOIN store s ON s.store_id = o.store_id WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.update: UPDATE review r JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = r.order_id SET r.rating = #{rating}, r.contents = #{contents}, r.amended_at = NOW() WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId} AND o.user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT store_id FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
